title: Open to new opportunities
body: I'm currently exploring new roles at the intersection of data engineering and full-stack development. Reach out on GitHub if you'd like to chat!

title: New project: data pipeline toolkit
body: Released an open-source toolkit for building lightweight, composable data pipelines in Python. Check it out on my GitHub.

title: Talk at local tech meetup
body: Gave a short talk on building ML-powered APIs with FastAPI and Pydantic. Slides available on request.
